zh.Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Gresley於1367年之前出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Nicholas de Gresley22歲，母親Thomasine de Wasteneys21歲。他於1392年與Margaret Walsh在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1430年被列為sheriff of staffordshire。他去世於大約1445年在英國德比夏爾，埋葬在英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Gresley于1367年之前出生在英国德比夏爾时，他的父亲Nicholas de Gresley22岁，母亲Thomasine de Wasteneys21岁。他于1392年与Margaret Walsh在英国英格兰德比夏爾德拉可洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1430年被列为sheriff of staffordshire。他去世于大约1445年在英国德比夏爾，埋葬在英国德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Gresley was born before 1367, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas de Gresley, was 22 and his mother, Thomasine de Wasteneys, was 21. He married Margaret Walsh in 1392, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. In 1430, his occupation is listed as sheriff of staffordshire. He died about 1445, in Derbyshire, England, and was buried in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Gresley est né avant 1367, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Gresley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Thomasine de Wasteneys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Walsh en 1392, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. En 1430, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of staffordshire. Il est décédé environ 1445, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Gresley vor 1367 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Gresley 22 und seine Mutter Thomasine de Wasteneys 21. Er hat 1392 in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Walsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1430 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of staffordshire aufgeführt. Er starb um 1445 in Derbyshire, England und wurde in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England
it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Gresley è nato il prima del 1367 nel Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas de Gresley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Thomasine de Wasteneys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Walsh nel 1392, nel Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1430, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of staffordshire. Morì circa 1445, nel Derbyshire, England, e fu sepolto a Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Gresleyが1367年以前にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Gresleyは22歳，母Thomasine de Wasteneysは21歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでMargaret Walshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1430年，職業はsheriff of staffordshireと記録されている。彼は約1445年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Gresley(이)가 1367년 이전 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Gresley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine de Wasteneys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 Margaret Walsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of staffordshire이었다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 더비실르에서 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 처르치 그레슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Gresley nasceu antes 1367, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Gresley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine de Wasteneys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Walsh em 1392, em Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1430, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of staffordshire. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1445, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England

ru.Drakelow, Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire,: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Gresley родился перед 1367 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Gresley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasine de Wasteneys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Walsh в 1392 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1430 году он работал по профессии sheriff of staffordshire. Он умер около 1445 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия и был похоронен в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Gresley nació antes de 1367, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Gresley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Thomasine de Wasteneys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Walsh en 1392, en Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1430, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of staffordshire. Murió aproximadamente 1445, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
